title: chimaphila umbellata subsp. acuta
intro: Chimaphila umbellata subsp. acuta, also known as the Northern Wintergreen or Pineberry, is a subspecies of the Wintergreen plant that is native to the mountainous regions of North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of methyl salicylate, a compound that is similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Chimaphila umbellata subsp. acuta include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to relieve pain and reduce swelling. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used to treat colds, fever, and digestive issues.
